response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance as 'VAVAVA! バーチャル大分' by Shirogane Noel based on the video context and on-screen text. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics, but no official source was found, likely because it is a song custom-made for the event. 3. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the on-screen display in the video. 4. Mapped the scenes based on the song structure (Intro, Main performance, End card).
response.global_summary: Shirogane Noel, joined by other VTubers, performs the song 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita' during her birthday celebration event. The song highlights various scenic spots in Oita, Japan. The performance concludes with a thank-you message.

scenes.description: Introductory segment of the song 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita' with on-screen lyrics appearing. Shirogane Noel is performing on a virtual stage.

たどりつく先 食べる弁当
時空を越えた奇跡の大地
バーチャル大分！
バーチャル大分
世に放つ
バーチャル大分
湯をわかす
君とバーチャル大分

バーチャル大分
バーチャル大分
どーん！

Takasakiyama and Kinrin Lake

Virtual Oita!

scenes.description: Main dance performance of 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita' by Shirogane Noel and other VTubers. Lyrics continue on screen.
